articles.title: Testing Against a Real GitLab Instance with Docker Compose
articles.summary: A pragmatic, language-agnostic setup for running GitLab and a local runner in Docker Compose so integration tests stay realistic locally and reusable in CI.

articles.title: Faster Integration Tests with Docker Compose (Instead of Per-Module Testcontainers)
articles.summary: A pragmatic approach for multi-module Maven projects: run one shared Docker Compose stack for faster tests, safer parallelism, and reusable E2E environments.
